title: Dastak
desc: A mentally unstable man develops an obsession with the Indian Miss Universe and starts chasing her.

title: Baazigar
desc: A scheming killer plans to destroy a businessman's family, starting with the brutal murder of his eldest daughter. This chilling thriller unfolds as the businessman fights to protect his loved ones.

title: Baazigar
desc: A cold-blooded man with a vendetta against a businessman decides to destroy his family.

title: Aarzoo
desc: Pooja marries Amar after Vijay's death. But when Vijay returns, her world spins again, torn between loyalty, love, and the life she's already begun to rebuild.

title: Aarzoo
desc: After her fiance Vijay's death, Pooja marries Amar and moves on but Vijay returns.

title: Mere Sajna Saath Nibhana
desc: He loves her deeply, but she's bound by a wealthy landlord's control. Their romance struggles against class divides, secrets, and the cruel grip of power.

title: Mere Sajna Saath Nibhana
desc: Kanhaiya falls in love with a woman, but icannot marry her due to her father's objection.

title: Andha Kanoon
desc: Vijay's parents are murdered. He partners with a framed forest officer, and the two begin a dangerous journey to take down Amar, Akbar, and Anthony, driven by pain and purpose.

title: Andha Kanoon
desc: Two siblings, Vijay and Durga, choose contrasting paths to avenge their parents' death.

title: Gopi Kishan
desc: Kishan, a criminal, impersonates policeman Gopi to find his father. His actions unexpectedly improve Gopi's life, leading to a twist of fate and identity.

title: Gopi Kishan
desc: Kishan learns about a policeman who looks like him and decides to use his identity.

title: Military Raaj
desc: A patriotic military officer decides to fight the criminal elements destroying the country.

title: Military Raaj
desc: Major Anand is reassigned to a camp for unruly cadets amid rising chaos.

title: Drohi
desc: In a gripping tale of friendship and betrayal, Samy and Karuna face the fallout of a tragic murder, leading to rivalries and unexpected love that test their bond.

title: Eena Meena Deeka
desc: A bank robbery mix-up entwines three individuals in a crackbrained cat-and-mouse game.

title: Eena Meena Deeka
desc: Deeka, newly released from prison, unexpectedly finds herself in the middle of a bank heist led by the clever Eena. Get ready for a wild ride of twists!

title: Khiladi
desc: Four friends play a prank of fake kidnapping which turns serious when one of them dies.

title: Khiladi
desc: Raj, Neelam, and Boney fake Sheetal's kidnapping as a prank, but things go horribly wrong when she is actually murdered. Now, all clues point to them as the prime suspects in the crime.

title: Sanam
desc: Amid the grim shadows of terrorism, love guides an army man and a village belle towards each other.

desc: When Preeti gets raped by a murderer, she is abandoned by her family.

desc: Pooja finds herself caught in a love triangle between her ex-husband and her boss.

title: Chor Machaaye Shor
desc: A thief acts as a policeman to extract a stolen diamond from the police headquarters.

title: Mard
desc: King Azad is locked in a dungeon by General Dyer. Later, Azad's son comes to his rescue.

title: Indrajeet
desc: A retired police officer sets out to avenge his adopted daughter and son-in-law's murder.

title: Vanvaas
desc: Deepak, aging and forgetful, seeks his vanished family after Shimla to Benaras. Conmen harm him, but reformers expose organ trafficking and his memory returns.

title: Roop Ki Rani Choron Ka Raja
